$comment: Worker signal file schema — written by /oneshot workers, read by /orchestrate coordinator. The signal file is advisory: the orchestrator derives authoritative completion from git/PR state (a merged PR on the worker's branch supersedes any stale signal; a live OPEN PR means the worker is not stalled even if the signal is stale). See CTL-32.

orchestrator.description: Name of the orchestrator that dispatched this worker

wave.description: Wave number this worker belongs to (1-indexed). Set by orchestrate-dispatch-next at dispatch time so workers can read their own wave briefing by exact path (`${ORCH_DIR}/wave-${WAVE}-briefing.md`) instead of globbing. Null on signal files written before CTL-208.

label.description: Display label for the session (e.g., 'oneshot CTL-33'). Auto-derived from skill + ticket, or user-provided via --label flag. Null if not set.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when worker was dispatched

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last status update

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worker's worktree directory

pid.description: OS process ID of the worker's claude process. Used by monitor for kill-0 liveness checks.

lastHeartbeat.description: ISO 8601 timestamp updated every time the worker writes to this file. Stale if >60s old for active workers.

phaseTimestamps.description: ISO 8601 timestamps recording when each phase started. Keys are phase names from the status enum.

completedAt.description: When the worker finished (done, failed, or stalled). Null while active.

cost.description: Token usage and cost, updated at phase transitions and on completion.

prOpenedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PR was opened (written by worker on gh pr create). Distinct from mergedAt so timeline analysis can separate PR-open duration from CI/review/merge latency.

autoMergeArmedAt.description: Deprecated (CTL-252): auto-merge is no longer armed. Retained for schema compatibility with workers dispatched before CTL-252. Always null for CTL-252+ workers.

mergedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the PR was actually merged. Written by the WORKER after gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch and REST confirmation via gh api. Null until merge. Orchestrator Phase 4 writes this only as a fallback for stalled workers.

pr.description: Pull request details (null until PR is created). The worker owns all fields — number, url, ciStatus, prOpenedAt, and mergedAt — by actively listening and merging (CTL-252). The orchestrator's poll loop is a safety net for stalled workers only.

linearState.description: Current Linear ticket state as reported by the worker

definitionOfDone.description: Self-reported completion status for each quality gate. The orchestrator independently verifies these claims.

testsWrittenFirst.description: Whether tests were written before implementation (TDD)

apiTests.description: API/integration test coverage (Bruno collections, supertest, etc.)

fixupCommit.description: Commit SHA pushed by a fix-up worker to resolve blockers on an already-open PR (Pattern A recovery). Written by the fix-up worker after `git push`. Distinct from `pr.mergedAt` — this records the remediation commit; the orchestrator still owns merge confirmation. Null for normal workers and for follow-up workers (use `followUpTo` instead).

followUpTo.description: Parent ticket ID if this worker is a follow-up ticket filed after the parent's PR was already merged (Pattern B recovery). Written by the orchestrator when initializing the follow-up worker's signal. Null for normal workers and for fix-up workers (use `fixupCommit` instead).

lastReviveReason.description: Reason the orchestrator last revived this worker (CTL-62, CTL-63). Written by `orchestrate-revive` on a successful revive. Null if never revived.

lastApiErrorUuid.description: UUID of the last API-error stream event (Stream idle timeout / partial response received) that `orchestrate-revive` has already handled (CTL-62). Used to dedup against the same error re-appearing in the appended stream JSONL after a successful revive. Null if no API-error revive has occurred.

blockedSince.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the first observation that this worker's PR entered mergeStateStatus=BLOCKED. Written by orchestrate-auto-fixup (CTL-64); cleared when the PR leaves BLOCKED. Used to enforce a stability window before auto-dispatching a fix-up worker.

fixupAttempts.description: Count of auto-fixup dispatches triggered by orchestrate-auto-fixup (CTL-64). Bumped on each successful dispatch; escalates to a `fixup-budget-exhausted` attention when it reaches --max-fixups (default 2).

lastFixupDispatchedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent auto-fixup dispatch by orchestrate-auto-fixup (CTL-64). For dashboard/telemetry only.

postMergeVerification.description: Independent verification results recorded by the orchestrator after the worker's PR merges (CTL-130). Workers auto-merge independently, so verification is always post-merge. Null until verification runs.

remediationTicket.description: Linear ticket ID for follow-up remediation if verification failed. Null on pass or before remediation is filed.
